response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video and identified conversational segments and three distinct vocal performances. 2. Identified songs through on-screen text: 'きゅーぴっと' (Cupid) by TeddyLoid, 'インキャラザパイ' (In-Chara-Za-Pai) by まる (OOSYS), and 'DA・LI・LA' by 佐野仁美. 3. Attempted to search for official lyrics using the identified original artists. Searches did not yield the full text of these specific original VTuber songs directly. 4. Generated the JSON structure reflecting the identified scenes and metadata.
response.global_summary: The video features a live performance by the VTuber Amane Kanata, consisting of three original songs followed by conversational segments. The songs performed are 'きゅーぴっと' (Cupid), 'インキャラザパイ' (In-Chara-Za-Pai), and 'DA・LI・LA'.

scenes.description: The performer, Amane Kanata, is talking to the audience. Guests are present in the bottom left corner. No vocal music is playing.
Amane Kanata performs her original song 'きゅーぴっと'. The text '作詞・作曲・編曲: TeddyLoid' appears on screen.
Amane Kanata performs her original song 'インキャラザパイ'. The text '作詞・作曲・編曲: まる (OOSYS)' appears on screen.
Amane Kanata performs her original song 'DA・LI・LA'. The text '作詞・作曲: 佐野仁美' appears on screen.
